_notes.purpose: Illustrative commercial property policy for the SME hail demo.
_notes.deductible: 2% of coverage ($27,000 on a $1.35M limit) — common for commercial property wind/hail.
_notes.coinsurance: Captured but does not alter calculations in Phase 1.
_notes.premium: Informational only — not used to estimate premium reduction.
_notes.update_path: Replace with actual policy terms when available.
